positions.comment: 260605113005324 | [STRONG BULLISH] [S2-PASS by gemini-3.5-flash | NONE] News: Marico reported strong Q4 FY26 results with consolidated net profit up 14-18% YoY to ₹391-408 crore and revenue up 22% YoY to ₹3,333 crore. Major brokerages (Nomura, JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs) maintained bullish ratings with targets up to ₹950. A final dividend of ₹4 per share was proposed. | The fundamental news of a strong Q4 earnings beat, positive brokerage upgrades/targets, and dividend announcement strongly confirms the LONG technical signal. There are no negative regulatory or corporate governance issues. | Bias: BULLISH (S1: PASS)

pending_positions.comment: PENDING-CANDLE-CONFIRMATION | [BEARISH] [S2-PASS by gemini-3.5-flash | RULE 4] News: Bata India Q4 FY26 net profit fell 95.2% YoY to ₹2.2 crore due to a one-time exceptional loss of ₹28 crore. EBITDA declined 15.3% and margins contracted to 18.2%. Brokerages remain divided, with Elara Capital maintaining an Accumulate rating (target ₹781) while others highlight persistent demand headwinds and negative same-store sales growth. | The technical signal is SHORT. The fundamental news confirms this bias, as the company reported a severe 95% drop in net profit and margin contraction in its latest earnings. Although some brokerages have mild accumulation ratings, the overall structural trend is bearish due to weak consumer demand in the footwear sector. No veto-triggering positive catalysts exist. | Bias: BEARISH (S1: PASS)
